releaseNotes:
• Auto-update system — clients notified on new release
• Screenshot privacy blur (personal apps & banking sites auto-detected)
• All 5 alert types (Low Productivity, Unauthorized App, No Activity)
• Brute-force login protection with account lockout
• Session auto-expiry and single-session enforcement
• Audit log for all admin and settings changes
• Activity day timeline (colour-coded 07:00–21:00 strip)
• Configurable data retention for all record types
• Employee consent management
